business_ideas.idea: Cameo Kit: build celebrity video shoutout app on top of Snapchat minis
Rent payment splitter app integrated into Snapcash for roommates
Post-meal food gifting via delivery platforms as last-minute gift

predictions.text: Snapchat minis and platform inflections are asymmetric bets worth taking time on
Being early to platform ecosystems (Snap Kit, Zoom apps) can yield outsized distribution
DTC brands need PE rollup model to survive by sharing customer acquisition costs
